# RAPath Swissmedic

> Swiss Medical Device Regulatory Reference

Plain English reference for Swiss Swissmedic medical device regulation — MedDO requirements, conformity assessment, and post-market obligations.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Start Here](https://rapath.org/swiss/start-here/overview)
- [Pre-Market](https://rapath.org/swiss/pre-market/overview)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/swiss/post-market/overview)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/swiss/legislation/meddo-overview)
- [Conformity Assessment Bodies](https://rapath.org/swiss/conformity-assessment-bodies/overview)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/swiss/whats-new/recent-regulatory-changes)

## Official Sources

- [Swissmedic](https://www.swissmedic.ch)
- [Fedlex MedDO SR 812.213](https://www.fedlex.admin.ch/eli/cc/2020/552/en)
- [DAPI Product Database](https://www.dapi.ch)

- [All Jurisdictions](https://rapath.org/#jurisdictions)
